case_title: LOPEZ, ROBERTA I VS POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

COURT ORDER DATED DECEMBER 19, 2007. FILED BY POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED SET FOR MAY-06-2008 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-15-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY TODAY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ROBERTA I
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT.

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A), "FOR PROGRESS REPORT. TO MONITOR POST JUDGMENT MEDIATION AGREEMENT; IF PARTIES IN COMPLIANCE, NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY, AND COURT WILL SET FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT IN JULY 2008". HEARING DATE IS SET ON MAY 6, 2008 @ 10:00AM, AS PER ORDER OF THE COMMISSIONER. COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUN-18-2007, DENIED
THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR MAY-15-2008 IS DENIED. NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES.
COPIES OF ORDER DENYING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF THE DEFENDANT WERE SENT TO ALL PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF DEPT OF SAN MATEO COUNTY.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, ROBERTA I AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-30-2007 (FEE FOR SERVICE: $59.00) AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECEIPT FROM SHERIFF OF SAN MATEO COUNTY THE ORIGINAL CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND COPIES OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $465.00 AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ROBERTA I RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POBRE, FE (FAYE) DUARTED $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,150.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF FOR THE PRINCIPLE ON THE SUBJECT PERSONAL LOAN. THE COURT DETERMINES THE LOAN TO BE USURIOUS, AND VOIDS THE INTEREST PROVISIONS OF THE LOAN. THE COURT FINDS FOR DEFENDANT ON THE REMAINING ELEMENTS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR COURT ORDER DATED DECEMBER 19, 2007. HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
